---
id: query-facts
title: "Query facts"
description: "Query facts by pattern with optional filtering. Returns results ordered by HLC ascending. Supports cursor-based pagination via the `cursor` field in the response. See spec §5.2."
sidebar_label: "Query facts"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query facts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/facts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Query facts by pattern with optional filtering. Returns results ordered by HLC ascending. Supports cursor-based pagination via the `cursor` field in the response. See spec §5.2.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
